text:
Created attachment 223826
.diff file for new port submission

RockPi E is a RK3328-based SBC with dual Ethernet.

See https://wiki.radxa.com/RockpiE.

Original work was done by Sergey (https://reviews.freebsd.org/p/s199p.wa1k9r_gmail.com/).
See: https://forum.radxa.com/t/freebsd-13-current-on-rock-pi4/2071/33
